title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Reiju, Unknown person #15, Judge, Unknown person #16 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know, I know... you said you'd be back but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't feel like waiting around for you so... chop, chop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The second day, I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's a banquet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Get away, or we'll shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: between you and me, I wanted to come get you on my own but you know the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but yeah, if I were alone, I don't think-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I remember you saying something about your hands being precious to you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you so much as think about leaving this island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, let's just say that you'll be cook- ing with your feet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: -So right now, zero's team is already in Wano, and-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone who was brave enough to reject one of Mama's invitations...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...Nami, chopper and Brook.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Also, since she insisted on coming, we've-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will be your first and only warning on the matter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: UWA4!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey now!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: What's the big idea, Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: leave...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You filthy, lowly sea thugs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Someone knows I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: My name...

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: ...is Vinsmoke Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I am prince...

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: of the Germa Kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I apologize for hiding it from you all until now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I had my reasons... I didn't want all of you to develop an inferiority complex...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For being such worthless peasants when standing in my presence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as I stay here... Wealth, soldiers, servants... All of it will be at my Beck and call.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Return to your ship and gallivant and roam the seas with you buffoons...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or stay put and live in eternal glory wanting for absolutely nothing with big mom's beautiful daughter by my side?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm sure even the world's biggest idiot...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can tell which of the two is the better option here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys really need to learn how to read between the lines... all that I wrote in the letter was just to soften the blow on you guys. I ain't going back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that you'd be dumb enough to come all the way here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sucks to be you but it was all in vain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Begone ...Wait... What was your name again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Screw that! I'm not buying any of this crap!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha, this is so rich! Here, I'll help you get rid of these pests!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You stay out of this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll Be The one... To take all this trash Back to where they Belong!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His patronizing farewell is like a stab to the heart!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
